name: skal-site
description: skal.dev — the website, as a Skal web app (Shape E prerendered).

scripts.build: vite build && bun run assets && bun run prerender && bun run md
scripts.assets: cp -R ../website/assets/. dist/assets/ && ([ -d ../website/gallery ] && cp -R ../website/gallery dist/gallery || true) && ([ -d ../website/gallery-flutter ] && cp -R ../website/gallery-flutter dist/gallery-flutter || true)
